title: selaginella sartorii
intro: Selaginella sartorii is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as resurrection ferns, due to their ability to survive in a dry state and revive when water is available. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Some of the health benefits associated with Selaginella sartorii include improved cardiovascular health, reduced oxidative stress, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
